queries: E2E pipeline Data Cleaning and Preprocessing recent authoritative sources
action.query: E2E pipeline Data Cleaning and Preprocessing recent authoritative sources

annotations.title: Data Preprocessing and Feature Engineering for Data Mining: Techniques, Tools, and Best Practices | MDPI
AI Pipeline Optimization on Xeon® Processors | Intel®
Basic Data Cleaning and Preprocessing Techniques - DataMites Offical Blog
Preprocessing Methods and Pipelines of Data Mining: An Overview
Step-E: A Differentiable Data Cleaning Framework for Robust Learning with Noisy Labels
Strategies for Optimizing End-to-End Artificial Intelligence Pipelines on Intel Xeon Processors

content.text:
Data cleaning and preprocessing are critical steps in developing robust end-to-end (E2E) machine learning pipelines. They ensure that raw data is transformed into a clean, structured format suitable for analysis and modeling. Below are several authoritative and recent sources that provide comprehensive insights into this topic:

1. **"Data Preprocessing and Feature Engineering for Data Mining: Techniques, Tools, and Best Practices"**  
   This article discusses best practices in data preprocessing, including data splitting, handling missing values, and feature selection. It emphasizes the importance of reproducibility and transparency in preprocessing pipelines. ([mdpi.com](https://www.mdpi.com/2673-2688/6/10/257?utm_source=openai))

2. **"AI Pipeline Optimization on Xeon® Processors"**  
   This Intel article explores optimization strategies for AI pipelines, highlighting the significance of efficient data preprocessing stages to enhance overall performance. ([intel.com](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/developer/articles/technical/optimizing-end-to-end-ai-pipelines.html?utm_source=openai))

3. **"Data Preprocessing Best Practices"**  
   This blog post outlines essential techniques for data cleaning and transformation, focusing on handling missing values, removing duplicates, and normalizing data to prepare it for machine learning applications. ([numberanalytics.com](https://www.numberanalytics.com/blog/data-preprocessing-best-practices-machine-learning?utm_source=openai))

4. **"Basic Data Cleaning and Preprocessing Techniques"**  
   This article provides an overview of fundamental data cleaning methods, including handling missing values, removing duplicates, and normalizing data, which are essential for effective data analysis. ([datamites.com](https://datamites.com/blog/basic-data-cleaning-and-preprocessing-techniques/?utm_source=openai))

5. **"Preprocessing Methods and Pipelines of Data Mining: An Overview"**  
   This paper offers a comprehensive overview of data preprocessing techniques, categorizing them into data cleaning, data transformation, and data preprocessing, and discusses their impact on data mining models. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/1906.08510?utm_source=openai))

6. **"DiffML: End-to-end Differentiable ML Pipelines"**  
   This research introduces DiffML, a framework that integrates data preprocessing steps into differentiable machine learning pipelines, allowing for joint training of preprocessing and modeling components. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2207.01269?utm_source=openai))

7. **"Step-E: A Differentiable Data Cleaning Framework for Robust Learning with Noisy Labels"**  
   This study presents Step-E, a framework that integrates sample selection and model learning into a single optimization process, focusing on data cleaning for robust learning with noisy labels. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.17040?utm_source=openai))

8. **"Strategies for Optimizing End-to-End Artificial Intelligence Pipelines on Intel Xeon Processors"**  
   This paper discusses optimization strategies for E2E AI pipelines, emphasizing the role of efficient data preprocessing in achieving high performance on Intel Xeon processors. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.00286?utm_source=openai))

These sources provide a solid foundation for understanding the importance and methodologies of data cleaning and preprocessing in E2E machine learning pipelines.
